title: Falcode Config
description: Configuration for the falcode terminal multiplexer. Place this file at ~/.config/falcode/config.json or <project>/falcode.json.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema file.

tabs.description: Inner tabs shown inside every workspace. Tabs without a command run an interactive shell. When omitted, tabs are inherited from the global config or built-in defaults.

appended_tabs.description: Additional tabs appended after the resolved tabs list. Useful in a repo-level falcode.json to add project-specific tabs on top of globally configured ones.

keybinds.description: Key binding configuration. If omitted, the built-in defaults are used.

worktree_scripts.description: Ordered list of paths relative to the newly created worktree to search for a setup script. The first existing file is executed after the worktree is created. Defaults to ["falcode.sh", "worktree.sh"].

theme.description: Name of the color theme to load from ~/.config/falcode/themes/{name}.json. Defaults to "default".

theme_scheme.description: Color scheme variant to use: "system" auto-detects the OS dark/light mode, "dark" and "light" force a specific scheme.

hide_footer.description: When true, the footer bar (prefix hint and version) is hidden.

new_tab_button.description: When true (default), a clickable + button is shown at the end of the inner tab bar.

new_workspace_button.description: When true (default), a clickable + button is shown at the end of the workspace tab bar.

close_tab_button.description: Controls when the × close button is shown on inner tabs: "all" always, "focus" only on the active tab, "none" never.

close_workspace_button.description: Controls when the × close button is shown on workspace tabs: "all" always, "focus" only on the active workspace, "none" never. Defaults to "none".

compact_tabs.description: When true, the workspace row and inner tab row are merged into a single unified row. Inactive workspaces flank the active workspace's tabs. Defaults to false.

show_workspace_numbers.description: When true, each workspace tab label is prefixed with its 1-based index number (e.g. "1 main", "2 feature-x"). Matches the default 1-9 go_to_workspace keybinds. Defaults to true.

show_tab_numbers.description: When true, each inner tab label is prefixed with its keybind letter (e.g. "a editor", "b console"). Matches the default a-z go_to_tab keybinds. Defaults to true.

notifications.description: Sound notification settings for agent status changes.

sound_on_idle.description: Play a sound when the agent finishes its turn (becomes idle or shows ✓ / ?). Defaults to true.

sound_on_permission.description: Play a sound when the agent is waiting for a permission grant (!). Defaults to true.

command.description: Command to run in the tab (e.g. "opencode", "lazygit"). Omit to open an interactive shell.

auto_run.description: When false, the command is not started automatically when the tab is first visited. The tab shows the "press Enter to restart" banner immediately, and the command only runs when the user explicitly presses Enter. Has no effect on interactive (shell) tabs. Defaults to true.

prefix.description: The prefix key that enters prefix mode (unlocks falcode controls). Examples: "ctrl+b", "ctrl+a".

keybind.description: A single key binding. Either a leaf (action/actions) or a group (bindings) that opens a sub-layer.

key.description: Key to press. Single characters ("n", "p", "x") or modifier combos ("ctrl+b").

label.description: Optional short label shown in the which-key overlay instead of the raw key string.

description.description: Human-readable description shown in the which-key overlay.

action.description: Single action to execute. Use this or "actions", not both.

actions.description: Ordered list of actions to execute. Use "lock" as the last entry to return to locked (normal) mode after execution. Without "lock", the user stays in the current layer.

params.description: Optional parameters passed to the action (e.g. tab or workspace index for go_to_tab / go_to_workspace).

bindings.description: Sub-bindings that form a nested layer. When set, this keybind is a group and action/actions are ignored.

sheet_key.description: Overrides the key label shown in the which-key overlay. Useful for collapsing a range of bindings into one representative row (e.g. "1-9" or "a-z").

sheet_hide.description: When true, this binding is omitted from the which-key overlay. Use it for the non-representative entries in a range already summarised by another binding's sheet_key.
